# Chiet suat cua Gel quang hoc (Optical Coupling Gel/Silicone)
# Dai chiết suất 1.4x - 1.5x giup toi uu hoa truyen qua photon tu Nuoc (1.33) -> SiPM (~1.5)
# Cot 1: Wavelength(nm), Cot 2: RINDEX
